title: Proclamation No. 674, s. 1960
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PHILIPPINES OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 674

EXCLUDING FROM THE OPERATION OF EXECUTIVE ORDERS NOS. 35 AND 35, SERIES OF 1904 AND 1912, RESPECTIVELY, A PARCEL OF LAND IN THE SITIO OF BINABAAN, MUNICIPALITY OF CULION, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, ISLAND OF CULION, AND DECLARING THE SAME OPEN TO DISPOSITION UNDER THE PROVISIONS OF COMMONWEALTH ACT NO. 137, AS AMENDED

WHEREAS, a petition has been filed for the exclusion of a certain parcel of land from the operation of Executive Orders Nos. 35 and 35, series of 1904 and 1912, respectively, which established the Culion Leper Colony reservation;

WHEREAS, the findings of the Director of Mines show that the area sought to be excluded from the Culion Leper Colony reservation is not at present inhabited by lepers and is highly mineralized;

NOW, THEREFORE, upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the provisions of section 14 of Commonwealth Act No. 137, otherwise known as the Mining Act, I, Carlos P. Garcia, President of the Philippines, do hereby exclude certain parcel of the public domain from the Culion Leper Colony reservation established under Executive Orders Nos. 35 and 35, series of 1904 and 1912, respectively, and declare the same open to disposition under the provisions of the Mining Act, which area is particularly described to wit:

Beginning at a point marked 1, which is the Coast and Geodetic Station OLTALORO on the summit of Mount Oltaloro, province of Palawan, with latitude 11° 43′ 49.706″ and longitude 120° 01′ 42.340″; thence S. 37° 12′ E., 1,510.00 meters to point 2; thence S. 66° 45′ W., 188.81 meters to point 3; thence S. 50° 44′ W., 1,044.88 meters to point 4; thence S. 38° 26′ W., 642.98 meters to point 5; thence N. 78° 20′ W., 1,375.00 meters to point 6; and thence N. 40° 00’E., 2,825.13 meters to point 1; which is the point of beginning, containing an area of 297.9013 hectares, more or less; subject to the condition that if within three years from the date of the granting of the lease by the government the applicant does not start the exploitation of the mineral resources of the above-described parcel of land, or upon the termination of the exploitation of the said parcel of land, or in the event the applicant abandons the work, the said parcel of land shall revert as part of the Culion Leper Colony reservation.

This proclamation shall take effect only upon the concurrence of the Congress of the Philippines.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 12th day of May, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty, and of the Independence of the Philippines, the fourteenth.

CARLOS P. GARCIA President of the Philippines

By the President:

NATALIO P. CASTILLO Executive Secretary

Source: University of the Philippines, College of Law Library
